ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the client */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the client */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the client */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the client */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the client */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the policy belongs to */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy (e.g., term, whole life) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the policy matures */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Annual premium amount for the policy */,
  "death_benefit" REAL /* Death benefit amount for the policy */,
  "premium_payment_frequency" TEXT /* Premium payment frequency (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary of the policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, lapsed, surrendered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the financial record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial record */,
  "calendar_year" INTEGER /* Calendar year of the financial record */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium amount for the year */,
  "cash_value" REAL /* Cash value of the policy for the year */,
  "death_benefit" REAL /* Death benefit amount for the year */,
  "used_from_savings" REAL /* Amount used from savings for the year */,
  "loan_balance" REAL /* Loan balance for the year */,
  "available_cv" REAL /* Available cash value for the year */,
  "twenty_percent_cv" REAL /* 20% of the available cash value for the year */,
  "savings_outside_igic" REAL /* Savings outside of the insurance policy for the year */,
  "total_liquidity" REAL /* Total liquidity for the year */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate applied to the cash value */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends earned on the policy */,
  "net_cash_value" REAL /* Net cash value after deducting outstanding loans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_financials_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the loan is taken against */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was taken */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate on the loan */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date the loan is to be repaid */,
  "repayment_amount" REAL /* Amount to be repaid for the loan */,
  "outstanding_balance" REAL /* Current outstanding balance of the loan */,
  "repayment_schedule" TEXT /* Repayment schedule for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings_accounts" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the savings account belongs to */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of savings account (e.g., high-yield, money market) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the savings account */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate on the savings account */,
  "opened_date" TEXT /* Date the savings account was opened */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date the savings account was closed */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the savings account (e.g., active, inactive, closed) */,
  "minimum_balance_requirement" REAL /* Minimum balance required to avoid fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* ID of the savings account the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer) */,
  "transfer_to/from_account" INTEGER /* ID of the account transferred to/from (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_transactions_savings_id FOREIGN KEY ("savings_id") REFERENCES savings_accounts ("savings_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, advisor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial goal */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of financial goal (e.g., retirement, education, savings) */,
  "target_amount" REAL /* Target amount for the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "current_amount" REAL /* Current amount saved towards the goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress towards the goal (as a percentage) */,
  "goal_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the goal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "target_rate_of_return" REAL /* Target rate of return for investments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_goals_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_riders" (
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy rider */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the rider belongs to */,
  "rider_type" TEXT /* Type of policy rider (e.g., waiver of premium, accidental death benefit) */,
  "rider_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy rider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_riders_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_accounts" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the investment account belongs to */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of investment account (e.g., brokerage, retirement) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the investment account */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date the investment account was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment transaction */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment account the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of investment transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_transactions_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investment_accounts ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_returns" (
  "tax_return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax return */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the tax return belongs to */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year of the tax return */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Gross income reported on the tax return */,
  "tax_liability" REAL /* Tax liability for the tax return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_returns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estate_planning_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estate planning document */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of estate planning document (e.g., will, power of attorney) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estate_planning_documents_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
